items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
